prompt: A highly detailed anime-style portrait of a seated shrine maiden princess in an opulent traditional Japanese palace interior, centered in a vertical composition. She is a young woman with very long flowing mint green hair fading into yellow-green at the tips, soft pink accent strands, straight bangs, and ornate hair ornaments including 2 tall faceted crystal fox ears, 1 pink flower cluster, and 2 small ribbon clips. Her face is intentionally obscured with a soft square blur. She wears an elaborate layered kimono and dress ensemble in deep indigo, violet, magenta, white, and gold, with rich brocade, floral embroidery, lace sleeves, tassels, cords, and jeweled obi ornaments. The outer robe is dark navy with intricate multicolor floral patterns and metallic trim; the inner dress is glossy white with ruffles and delicate translucent fabric. She is posed kneeling formally on a reflective lacquered floor, one hand resting on her lap and the other on the floor beside her, with long sleeves and trailing fabric spread elegantly around her. The setting is a grand ceremonial hall with 4 visible red lacquer columns, 3 hanging lanterns, tall shoji windows on the left casting warm golden sunset light, purple hanging banners with floral crests, a richly patterned coffered ceiling in blue, gold, and red, and folding screens in the background painted with trees and birds. Ultra-detailed, luminous cinematic lighting, polished reflections, intricate textiles, regal atmosphere, fantasy shrine aesthetic, high-end anime illustration, sharp focus on costume and environment, vibrant jewel tones, masterpiece quality.
